Arterial hypertension.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "- Obesity - Permanent AF.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Known right bundle branch block.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "- Valvular heart disease.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "Moderate aortic stenosis.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "- Previous TIA - 7/2022 ischemic stroke n the left corona radiata, presenting with a right upper limb stenotic deficit, with no gross sequelae (patient reports persistence of slight right upper limb stenotic deficit) - COPD in active smoker (10 cigarettes/day) - Lower limb neuropathy (repeated falls) - Hepatic steatosis - Cholelithiasis - Psoriasis - SAD - Excision of a basal cell carcinoma/epithelial carcinoma on the nasal apex - Previous cataract surgery on the right eye - From 9/30/22 to 10/7/22 hospitalization at Ophthalmic Hospital for repeated falls and IR2 due to SARS CoV2 infection - At the end of 10/2022, hospitalization at VIII floor Care Unit for bilateral pleural effusion and pulmonary thickening (no documentation) - Lives at home with RELATIVE; not self-sufficient in ADLs; spends most of the time in a wheelchair; walking with a walker for very short stretches Therapy: pantoprazole 20 mg, bisoprolol 2.5 mg, apixaban 5 mg x 2, amlodipine 10 mg, foster 2 puffs x 2, pregabalin 75 mg x 2, bromazepam 15 drops, escitalopram 10 drops Allergies: REPORTS NONE KNOWN tel RELATIVE PHONE_NUMBER", 0.0, 0.5)
